back_translation: And the fifth angel blew the trumpet, and I saw a star that fell from heaven down to the earth, and he received the key of the pit of the deep abyss
And he opened the pit of the abyss, and there was smoke ascending from that pit, like the smoke from a great furnace, and the sun and the air became dark because of the smoke from the pit
And from that smoke, locusts came out onto the earth, and they received authority just like scorpions on the earth that have authority
And it was said to them not to destroy the grass of the earth, or any green plant, or any tree, except people who do not have the seal of God on their foreheads
And they received authority not to kill them, but to torment them for five months, and the torment of them was like the torment of a scorpion, when it stings a person
And in those days, all people will seek death and will not find it, and will desire to die, but death will flee from them
And those locusts had a form like horses prepared for war, and on their heads there was something like golden crowns, and their faces were like the faces of humans
They had hair like the hair of women, and their teeth were like the teeth of lions
They had breastplates like iron breastplates, and the sound of their wings was like the sound of chariots and many horses running into war
They had tails like the tails of scorpions, with stingers, and in their tails was their authority to harm people for five months
They had a king who is the angel of the deep abyss, his name in Hebrew is ‘Abaddon,’ and in Greek the name is ‘Apollyon’
The first woe has passed away. Behold, there are still two more woes that will come after this
And the sixth angel blew the trumpet, and I heard one voice from the horns of the golden altar that is before the face of God
That voice said to the sixth angel who held the trumpet, ‘Release the four angels who are bound at the great river Euphrates’
And the four angels who had been prepared for the hour, day, month, and year, were released, in order to kill one-third of all people
And the number of the army of cavalry was two hundred million. I heard the number of them

And I saw the horses and those riding on the horses in the vision, in this way: They had breastplates of fire-red, sapphire-blue, and sulfur-yellow color. And the heads of the horses were like the heads of lions, and from the mouths of them came out fire, smoke, and sulfur
One-third of all people were killed from these three plagues, namely fire, smoke, and sulfur that came out of their mouths
Because the authority of the horses was in the mouths and in the tails of them, because the tails of them were like snakes, having heads, and they used those things to harm

But the rest of all people, who were not killed from these plagues, did not repent from the works of their hands, so that they would stop worshiping demons and idols of gold, silver, bronze, stone, and wood, which cannot see, cannot hear, cannot walk
And they did not repent from their murder, from their sorcery, from their sexual-immorality, or from their theft
